EXTHEAD Site Masthead

SIDEBAR This navigation column floats to the right, laid out entirely by an EXTERNAL stylesheet the engine fetched via <link>.

LEDE The body copy flows to the left of the sidebar. None of this layout is inline — the float, colour and margins all come from the linked sheet.

PLAIN A second paragraph continues the article text beside the floated sidebar until it clears the bottom.

WARNBLOCK This paragraph is coloured by an external class rule.
